meta.title: burnnote — one-time secrets
meta.description: Share secrets that self-destruct after one read.

footer.note: Encrypted in your browser. The server never sees the key.

create.heading: Share a one-time secret
create.description: The secret is encrypted in your browser. The server stores only the ciphertext. The URL is destroyed after a single read.
create.result_note: Share this URL. It works only once.

reveal.no_key_body: This URL is missing the decryption key (the part after #). Without it the secret cannot be decrypted.
reveal.gone_body: It has been read once, or it has expired.
reveal.ready_title: A secret is waiting for you
reveal.ready_body: Once revealed, it will be permanently deleted from the server. You will not be able to re-open this link.
reveal.destroyed_note: This secret has been destroyed on the server.
